title: pam bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[1.3.1-39.0.1]
- pam_limits: fix use after free in pam_sm_open_session [Orabug: 36272695]

[1.3.1-39]
- pam_unix: sync expiry checks with shadow.
  Resolves: RHEL-70476
